llm_response: Dear Hotel Manager, I am writing to inquire about room availability for next weekend as I plan a short business trip to your city. Could you please provide details regarding available room types and their corresponding pricing for those dates? I would also appreciate a written confirmation once a reservation is made to ensure my plans are secure. As the old Chinese poem says, "床前明月光，疑是地上霜。举头望明月，低头思故乡." Please let me know if you have any special offers for travelers. Looking forward to your response.
